items.blinded_text:
This market is about whether both teams slay at least one elemental Entity J during Game 2. In Entity A, elemental dragons (Entity B, Entity C, Entity D, Entity E, Entity F, and Entity G) spawn in the Entity J pit starting at 5:00 game time. After being slain, the next Entity J spawns 5 minutes later. Once a team claims the Entity H (by slaying four dragons), all subsequent Entity J spawns become Elder Dragons. This market will resolve to "Yes[identifying quotation removed]No[identifying quotation removed]No". If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only. The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://Entity K/Team A/home. However, if https://Entity K/Team A/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.
https://Entity K/Team A/home

question: Game 2: Both Teams Slay a Entity J?
